meta.tagline: Curated knowledge for family, learning, and development

items.title: What Is Ollama, How to Use It, and Why It Matters (10 AI Prompts to Test Local Models)
items.excerpt: The practical, non-techie guide to running Ollama on your own machine (and when you should)
items.summary: Ollama allows users to run AI language models locally on their personal computers without relying on cloud services. The guide provides practical setup instructions and 10 specific prompts for testing local AI models for educational and productivity applications.
items.pullQuote: running AI models locally offers privacy and control over educational content

items.title: It Just Didn't Feel Right
items.excerpt: Human intuition triumphed over the algorithm
items.summary: The article explores situations where human intuition successfully overrode algorithmic recommendations or data-driven decisions. It examines the role of gut feelings and experiential knowledge in decision-making processes.
items.pullQuote: human intuition can outperform algorithmic decision-making in complex situations

items.title: Matt Eddy's Breakout MLB Prospects Team For 2026
items.excerpt: Matt Eddy's 12 breakout MLB prospects for 2026 include picks to click in the Red Sox, Cubs and Mets systems. The post Matt Eddy’s Breakout MLB Prospects Team For 2026 appeared first on College Baseball, MLB Draft, Prospects - Baseball America.

items.pullQuote: 12 breakout MLB prospects positioned for significant developmental leaps

items.title: Geoff Pontes' Breakout MLB Prospects Team For 2026

items.title: Perdomo's Strikeout Should Ensure ABS Comes To 2029 WBC
items.excerpt: I have done no reporting on this. I don’t know if it’s possible to have reporting insight on a decision still years away. But here’s… The post Perdomo’s Strikeout Should Ensure ABS Comes To 2029 WBC appeared first on College Baseball, MLB Draft, Prospects - Baseball America.
items.summary: A controversial strikeout call involving Perdomo highlights ongoing debates about implementing Automated Ball-Strike (ABS) systems in international competition. The incident may accelerate adoption of electronic strike zone technology for the 2029 World Baseball Classic.
items.pullQuote: Controversial strikeout may accelerate automated strike zone technology adoption

items.title: #384 – Special episode — Obicetrapib: The CETP inhibitor with cardiovascular benefits and potential Alzheimer's prevention
items.excerpt: "It's hard for me to mask my personal optimism around this. I love the biological plausibility of this, and I think that obicetrapib has done something that it's four predecessors has failed to do." —Peter Attia The post #384 – Special episode — Obicetrapib: The CETP inhibitor with cardiovascular benefits and potential Alzheimer’s prevention appeared first on Peter Attia.
items.summary: Dr. Peter Attia discusses obicetrapib, a CETP inhibitor drug that shows promise for cardiovascular protection and potential Alzheimer's prevention where four previous similar drugs failed. The episode covers the biological mechanisms and clinical trial data supporting this new therapeutic approach for longevity and cognitive health.
items.pullQuote: obicetrapib succeeded where four predecessor drugs failed in cardiovascular protection

items.title: Entering and Leaving Frames
items.excerpt: Why transitions, interruptions, and surprise reveal the hidden structure of conscious life
items.summary: Neuroscientist Bernard Baars explores how transitions, interruptions, and surprising events reveal the underlying structure of conscious awareness. The analysis examines how the brain processes shifts between different cognitive and perceptual frameworks in daily life.
items.pullQuote: transitions and surprise reveal hidden structure of conscious life

items.title: OpenClaw Masterclass

items.pullQuote: Complete beginner friendly guide to AI workflows and daily use

items.title: Trump's Stupidest Cabinet Member

items.summary: Political commentator Robert Reich evaluates Trump administration cabinet members based on perceived competence. The analysis focuses on identifying which appointee Reich considers least qualified for their position.
items.pullQuote: A hard call, but there's a clear winner

items.pullQuote: Minnesota offers lessons for navigating contemporary political difficulties

items.title: The Voter Fraud Fraud
items.excerpt: There just isn’t evidence of significant election cheating—but that won’t stop the GOP from pushing its dangerous SAVE America Act.
items.summary: Analysis finds insufficient evidence of significant election fraud despite ongoing Republican claims. The piece examines the GOP's SAVE America Act and its potential implications for election integrity debates.
items.pullQuote: No evidence of significant election cheating despite ongoing claims

items.title: How Does The Iran War End? | Shield of the Republic
items.excerpt: Eric and Eliot continue to wrestle with the ongoing Iran war, examining the media coverage surrounding it, the tactical successes the joint forces have had, the inexplicable failure to provide counter-drone defense to US forces, the baffling inattention to mine storage facilities that may have led to mines being seeded in the Gulf, and the enormous expenditure of munitions that may leave the US vu
items.summary: Foreign policy analysts examine ongoing Iran conflict, including tactical successes and strategic failures in US military operations. The discussion covers counter-drone defense gaps, Gulf mining concerns, and significant munitions expenditure affecting US military readiness.
items.pullQuote: Enormous munitions expenditure may leave US forces vulnerable

briefing.editorsNote: Today's digest explores emerging technologies that promise to transform how we learn, heal, and engage with information.

bullets.text: Ollama lets you run powerful AI models directly on your computer for private educational applications.
Controversial Perdomo strikeout call may finally bring automated strike zones to international baseball competition.
New drug obicetrapib shows promise for preventing both heart disease and Alzheimer's where others failed.
OpenClaw masterclass teaches beginners how to safely integrate AI tools into daily work routines.
New analysis reveals lack of evidence supporting widespread voter fraud claims and legislative responses.
